# MSK Institute

**Organization**: MSK Institute
**Type**: Educational Institute
**Specialty**: Computer Education

## Location
- **City**: Shikohabad
- **State**: Uttar Pradesh
- **Country**: India
- **Address**: Shikohabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: 8393042166
- **Email**: info@mskinstitute.in
- **Website**: https://mskinstitute.in

## About
MSK Institute is a professional computer education institute in Shikohabad, Uttar Pradesh, focused on providing accessible, high-quality computer education with hands-on training and practical projects. Founded to empower learners with industry-relevant skills and career support to succeed in the tech economy.

## Courses Offered

### 1. Python Programming
- **Duration**: 3 months
- **Level**: Beginner to Intermediate
- **Fee**: ₹8,999
- **Mode**: Online + Offline
- **Description**: Master Python from basics to advanced concepts including OOP, web scraping, and basic data analysis.
- **Topics**: Python Basics, Control Flow, Data Structures, OOP, File I/O, Error Handling, Libraries (requests, BeautifulSoup), Data Analysis (pandas)
- **Career Opportunities**: Junior Python Developer, Data Analyst Intern, Automation Tester

### 2. Java Development
- **Duration**: 4 months
- **Level**: Intermediate
- **Fee**: ₹10,999
- **Mode**: Online + Offline
- **Description**: Object-oriented programming and real-world projects for building scalable applications.
- **Topics**: Java Basics, OOP Concepts, Collections, Exception Handling, Multithreading, Database Integration

### 3. CCC (Course on Computer Concepts)
- **Duration**: 2 months
- **Level**: Beginner
- **Fee**: ₹3,999
- **Mode**: Online + Offline
- **Description**: Essential computer literacy for all students covering fundamental computer concepts.
- **Topics**: Computer Basics, MS Office, Internet, Email, Web Browser

### 4. ADCA (Advanced Diploma in Computer Applications)
- **Duration**: 6 months
- **Level**: Intermediate
- **Fee**: ₹15,999
- **Mode**: Online + Offline
- **Description**: Comprehensive computer applications training covering multiple tools and programming concepts.
- **Topics**: System Software, MS Office Suite, Database, Basic Programming

### 5. Data Analytics
- **Duration**: 5 months
- **Level**: Intermediate to Advanced
- **Fee**: ₹12,999
- **Mode**: Online + Offline
- **Description**: Analyze data and make informed decisions using Python, SQL, and BI tools.
- **Topics**: Data Collection, Cleaning, SQL, Python (pandas, numpy), Visualization, Business Intelligence

### 6. Web Development
- **Duration**: 6 months
- **Level**: Beginner to Intermediate
- **Fee**: ₹14,999
- **Mode**: Online + Offline
- **Description**: Build modern, responsive websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks.
- **Topics**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Responsive Design, Web APIs

## Pricing Summary
- **Starting Fee**: ₹3,999 (CCC)
- **Most Popular**: Python (₹8,999) and Web Development (₹14,999)
- **Premium**: ADCA (₹15,999)

## Facilities
- Modern computer labs with high-speed internet
- Experienced and knowledgeable instructors
- Hands-on practical training with real-world projects
- Placement assistance for suitable candidates
- Both in-person and online training available
- Certificate of completion for all courses

## Key Features
- **Practical Focus**: Real-world projects and industry-relevant curriculum
- **Flexible Learning**: Online and offline modes available
- **Career Support**: Resume building and interview preparation
- **Affordable Pricing**: Competitive fees starting from ₹3,999
- **Community**: Growing community of 1200+ enrolled students

## Placement & Career Support
- Professional resume building assistance
- Interview preparation coaching
- Job placement assistance for eligible candidates
- 7-day refund policy for student satisfaction
- Regular batch schedules throughout the year

## Upcoming Batches (as of 2026)
- Python Programming: July 5, 2026
- Web Development: July 10, 2026
- Data Analytics: July 15, 2026

- **Courses**: GET /api/courses
- **Lead Submission**: POST /api/lead

### 6. Web Development
- **Duration:** 6 months
- **Fee:** ₹14,999
- **Description:** Full-stack web development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks
- **Target:** Beginners to intermediate learners

## Facilities & Services
- Modern computer labs with latest software
- Wi-Fi enabled classroom
- Flexible batch timings (Morning, Afternoon, Evening)
- Online training options available
- Expert instructors with industry experience
- Placement assistance
- Interview preparation
- Resume building support
- Certificate upon completion

## Training Modes
- **In-Person:** Classroom training at our center in Shikohabad
- **Online:** Live virtual classes for remote learners
- **Hybrid:** Flexible combination of online and offline sessions

## Admissions
- **Admission Type:** Open enrollment (no entrance exam)
- **Prerequisites:** Basic computer literacy (for most courses)
- **How to Apply:** Call 8393042166 or visit our center for registration
- **Batches:** New batches starting every month

## Why Choose MSK Institute?
1. **Experienced Faculty:** Instructors with 5+ years of industry experience
2. **Practical Approach:** 70% practical, 30% theoretical learning
3. **Job-Oriented:** Curriculum aligned with industry requirements
4. **Affordable Fees:** Competitive pricing with flexible payment plans
5. **Success Rate:** 85% student placement rate
6. **Community:** Join a network of successful alumni

## FAQ
**Q: What are the prerequisites?**
A: Most courses are for beginners. Advanced courses may require basic computer knowledge.

**Q: Do you provide certificates?**
A: Yes, industry-recognized certificates upon successful course completion.

**Q: Is placement assistance available?**
A: Yes, we provide job placement support for eligible candidates.

**Q: Can I get a refund?**
A: 7-day refund policy if not satisfied with the course.

**Q: Are online classes available?**
A: Yes, both online and offline training options are available.
